detaileddescription.para: VREF = internal 1.8 V reference (VDD >= VREF + 0.2 V).
VREF = internal 2.4 V reference (VDD >= VREF + 0.2 V).

briefdescription.para: COMP reference selection.
COMP main operation mode.
COMP speed and power mode.

detaileddescription.para: Comparator hysteresis enabled at 40 mV level.
Comparator hysteresis enabled at 50 mV level.

briefdescription.para: COMP comparator hysteresis.
COMP current source selection on analog input.
COMP tasks.

detaileddescription.para: COMP is ready and output is valid.
Input voltage crossed the threshold going down.
Input voltage crossed the threshold going up.
Input voltage crossed the threshold in any direction.

briefdescription.para: COMP events.
COMP interrupts.
Shortcut between the CROSS event and the STOP task.
Shortcut between the UP event and the STOP task.
Shortcut between the DOWN event and the STOP task.
COMP shortcut masks.
COMP analog pin selection.
COMP external analog reference selection.
Function for enabling the COMP peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the COMP peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the COMP peripheral is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The COMP peripheral is enabled.
The COMP peripheral is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the reference source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP reference selection.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the external analog reference source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP external analog reference selection.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting threshold voltages.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP VDOWN and VUP thresholds.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the main mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP main operation mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the speed mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP speed and power mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the hysteresis.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP comparator hysteresis.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the current source on the analog input.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP current source selection on analog input.

briefdescription.para: Function for selecting the active input of the COMP.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Input to be selected.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the last COMP compare result.

simplesect.para: If VIN+ == VIN-, the return value depends on the previous result.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: The last compare result. If 0, then VIN+ < VIN-. If 1, then VIN+ > VIN-.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling interrupts from COMP.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_comp_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling interrupts from COMP.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_comp_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_comp_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified COMP task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified COMP task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified COMP event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified COMP event.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting COMP shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of shortcuts.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing COMP shortcuts by mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of shortcuts.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified COMP task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified COMP event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
COMP event to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the COMP event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting COMP trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trimming value

briefdescription.para: Function for getting COMP trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether COMP has ISOURCE register.
Symbol indicating whether the configuration of analog input using pin number is present.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has REFTRIM register.
Symbol indicating whether VDD/2 can be selected as analog input of COMP.
Symbol indicating whether VDDH/5 can be selected as analog input of COMP.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has an internal 1.8 V reference.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has an internal 2.4 V reference.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has an AVDDAO 1.8 V reference.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has a VDD reference.
Symbol indicating whether COMP supports normal SP mode.
Symbol indicating whether COMP has hysteresis functionality.
Symbol indicating whether COMP supports 40 mV hysteresis.
Symbol indicating whether COMP supports 50 mV hysteresis.
Hardware access layer (HAL) for managing the Comparator (COMP) peripheral.
